an2.23:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, these two misrepresent the Tathāgata. Which two?One who explains what has not been stated and uttered by the Tathāgata as having been stated and uttered by him, and one who explains what has been stated and uttered by the Tathāgata as not having been stated and uttered by him. These two misrepresent the Tathāgata.
